      "text": "3. Tawas Luhpastrr ka far-

4. Taws Kallis irr ka tas
Dahwida Tuhrnis/ kas ustai-
tihts irr par Eerotfschu Uhskahr-
schanu/kur tuhktoschas Preekch-
turranas Brunnas karkahs/
wiffadas Brunnas to Stipro.
5. Tawas diwi Kruhtis irr
ka diwi Stirnas-Behrni/ kas
starp Litjehm ganna.
6. Teekans ta Deena dsestra
tohp/ un ta Ehna atkahpjahs.
Es eeschu pee ta Mirres-Kalna/
un pee ta Wibraka-Pakalna.
7. Tu effi wiffat skaista man-
na Draudsene/ un pee tewig ne
kahdas Watnas irratd.
8. Nahz ar mann/ no ta Lib-
banus/ manna Bruhte/ nahz ar
mann no Libbanus. Skattajs
no ta Wirg-Galla Amana/ no
ta Wirg-Galla Sentra un Er-
moxa/ no to Lawu Allahm/ no
to Leoparderu Kalneem.
9. Tu effi man to Sirđi at-

Bruhte/ tu effi man to Sirđi
atrehmuft ar weenn no tawahm
Azzim/ ar weenahm Schfehdchm
no tawa Kakla.
10. Zik skaistas irr tawas
Mihlestibas/ manna Mahfa/
mihta Bruhte/ zik labbakas irr
tawas Mihlestibas/neka Wihrs/
un tawas Etjes Smarfscha/"

12. Manna Mahfa/ mihta
Bruhte/ tu effi weens nieslehgts
Dahrs/ weens aisslehgts A-
wots/ weena aissehgeleta Akka.
13. Tawi Edehsti irr ka jauks
Dahrs/ no Granatu-Ahboteim
ar dahrguem Augteim/ Ziperu
ar Nardeim.
14. Nardus un Satrans/
Kalinus un Kanneles/ ar wiﬀa-

15. Itt ka weena Dahrsu
Akka/ ka weena Akka ar dschwu
Uhdeni/ kas no Libbanus teke.
16. Zellees Seemeli/ un nah-
zt Puhs-Deenas Wehjsch/ puhtt
zaur mannu Dahrsu/ ka winna
Sahles pill.
